recommendations.title: Seaspiracy
recommendations.overview: Passionate about ocean life, a filmmaker sets out to document the harm that humans do to marine species — and uncovers an alarming global conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Sicko
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the corrupt health care system in The United States whose main goal is to make profit even if it means losing people’s lives. "The more people you deny health insurance, the more money we make" is the business model for health car

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: The Secret
recommendations.overview: Interviews with leading authors, philosophers and scientists, with an in-depth discussion of the Law of Attraction. The audience is shown how they can learn and use 'The Secret' in their everyday lives.

recommendations.title: Objectified
recommendations.overview: A feature-length documentary about our complex relationship with manufactured objects and, by extension, the people who design them.

recommendations.title: HyperNormalisation
recommendations.overview: We live in a world where the powerful deceive us. We know they lie. They know we know they lie. They do not care. We say we care, but we do nothing, and nothing ever changes. It is normal. Welcome to the post-truth world. How we got to where we are n

recommendations.title: Marvel One-Shot: All Hail the King
recommendations.overview: A documentary filmmaker interviews the now-famous Trevor Slattery from behind bars.

recommendations.title: The Bridge
recommendations.overview: The Bridge is a controversial documentary that shows people jumping to their death from the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco - the world's most popular suicide destination. Interviews with the victims' loved ones describe their lives and mental he

recommendations.title: Chronicle of a Summer
recommendations.overview: Paris, summer 1960. Anthropologist and filmmaker Jean Rouch and sociologist and film critic Edgar Morin wander through the crowded streets asking passersby how they cope with life's misfortunes.
